action_set_definitions.name: get_system_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial environment state including the target SQL query, table schemas, and existing index configurations.

example_output.database_schema: CREATE TABLE delivery_points (id INT, geom GEOMETRY...)

action_set_definitions.name: get_query_cost
action_set_definitions.description: Explains the provided SQL query and returns the total estimated execution cost and execution plan breakdown.

query.description: The SQL query to be analyzed by the query optimizer.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_spatial_diagnostics
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes specific geometric columns for complexity (vertex count) and disk-level spatial correlation (clustering status).

table_name.description: Name of the table to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_spatial_index
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a high-performance spatial index (e.g., GiST or SP-GiST) on a specific column to facilitate pruning.

action_set_definitions.name: optimize_geometry_complexity
action_set_definitions.description: Reduces the internal vertex count of geometric objects using a simplification algorithm while maintaining topological accuracy.

action_set_definitions.name: reorganize_physical_storage
action_set_definitions.description: Reorders the data on disk (clustering) based on a spatial index to minimize I/O during range searches.

index_name.description: The spatial index to use as the template for disk ordering.

action_set_definitions.name: refresh_optimizer_stats
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the database's internal statistics to ensure the optimizer correctly recognizes new data distributions and index availability.

state_description.database_schema: The DDL or structured definition of tables, columns, and data types in the environment.
state_description.table_statistics: Metadata regarding data distribution, including row counts, page counts, and column cardinality.
state_description.active_indexes: A list of currently existing indexes on the database tables.
state_description.target_query: The SQL query string that the agent is currently tasked to optimize.
state_description.optimizer_config: Settings for the simulated query optimizer, such as cost weights for I/O vs CPU.

task_initial_state.target_query: UPDATE deliveries d SET zone_id = z.id FROM service_zones z WHERE ST_Intersects(d.location, z.boundary);
